definition: The short term state of the atmosphere at a specific time and place, including the temperature, relative humidity, cloud cover, precipitation, wind, etc.
example: We need to understand the concept of weather.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về thời tiết.

definition: An area of the earth's surface between two parallels of latitude.
example: We need to understand the concept of climate.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm khí hậu.

definition: A star, especially when seen as the centre of any single solar system.
example: We need to understand the concept of sun.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về mặt trời.

definition: A sunfish.
example: We need to understand the concept of sunny.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nắng.

definition: Condensed water falling from a cloud.
example: The rains came late that year.
exampleVi: Năm đó mưa đến muộn.

definition: Pouring with rain; wet; showery
example: Due to the rainy weather, we decided not to play in the park.
exampleVi: Do thời tiết mưa nên chúng tôi quyết định không chơi ở công viên.

definition: A rock; boulder; a hill.
example: We need to understand the concept of cloud.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về đám mây.

definition: Covered with or characterised by clouds; overcast.
example: We need to understand the concept of cloudy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm mây.

definition: Real or perceived movement of atmospheric air usually caused by convection or differences in air pressure.
example: As they accelerated onto the motorway, the wind tore the plywood off the car's roof-rack.
exampleVi: Khi họ tăng tốc trên đường cao tốc, gió xé toạc tấm ván ép khỏi giá nóc ô tô.

definition: Fart
example: We need to understand the concept of windy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm gió.

definition: The frozen, crystalline state of water that falls as precipitation.
example: We need to understand the concept of snow.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về tuyết.

definition: Marked by snow, characterized by snow.
example: snowy day
exampleVi: ngày tuyết rơi

definition: Any disturbed state of the atmosphere, especially as affecting the earth's surface, and strongly implying destructive or unpleasant weather.
example: We need to understand the concept of storm.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bão.

definition: Of or pertaining to storms.
example: We need to understand the concept of stormy.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bão tố.

definition: A measure of cold or heat, often measurable with a thermometer.
example: The temperature in the room dropped nearly 20 degrees; it went from hot to cold.
exampleVi: Nhiệt độ trong phòng giảm gần 20 độ; nó chuyển từ nóng sang lạnh.

definition: (with up) To heat; to make or become hot.
example: We need to understand the concept of hot.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nóng.

definition: (of a thing) Having a low temperature.
example: A cold wind whistled through the trees.
exampleVi: Một cơn gió lạnh thổi qua hàng cây.

definition: Having a temperature slightly higher than usual, but still pleasant; mildly hot.
example: The tea is still warm.
exampleVi: Trà vẫn còn ấm.

definition: A moderate or refreshing state of cold; moderate temperature of the air between hot and cold; coolness.
example: in the cool of the morning
exampleVi: trong buổi sáng mát mẻ

definition: A relatively low-gravity beer, often with a dark colour; mild ale
example: We need to understand the concept of mild.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm nhẹ nhàng.

definition: a word related to this topic

definition: a word related to this topic

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word thunder.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word lightning.

definition: a word related to this topic
example: This is an example sentence using the word forecast.
exampleVi: Đây là một câu ví dụ sử dụng từ dự báo.

definition: A light, gentle wind.
example: The breeze rustled the papers on her desk.
exampleVi: Gió thổi xào xạc những tờ giấy trên bàn cô.

definition: To sing; charm; enchant.
example: We need to understand the concept of gale.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về gió.

definition: The gases surrounding the Earth or any astronomical body.
example: We need to understand the concept of atmosphere.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về khí quyển.

definition: Light rain.
example: We need to understand the concept of drizzle.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm mưa phùn.

definition: A severe tropical cyclone in the North Atlantic Ocean, Caribbean Sea, Gulf of Mexico, or in the eastern North Pacific off the west coast of Mexico, with winds of 119 km/h (74 miles per hour) or greater accompanied by rain, lightning, and thunder that sometimes moves into temperate latitudes.
example: We need to understand the concept of hurricane.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bão.

definition: A heavy rain.
example: They got caught in a downpour without an umbrella and came back soaked.
exampleVi: Họ mắc phải một trận mưa như trút nước mà không mang theo ô và trở về trong tình trạng ướt sũng.

definition: A pressing; a force applied to a surface.
example: Apply pressure to the wound to stop the bleeding.
exampleVi: Áp lực lên vết thương để cầm máu.

definition: A brief fall of precipitation (spell of rain, or a similar fall of snow, sleet, or cascade).
example: Today there will be frequent showers and some sunny spells.
exampleVi: Hôm nay sẽ có mưa rào thường xuyên và có vài đợt nắng.

definition: A piece of information describing, or an account of certain events given or presented to someone, with the most common adpositions being by (referring to creator of the report) and on (referring to the subject).
example: A report by the telecommunications ministry on the phone network revealed a severe capacity problem.
exampleVi: Báo cáo của Bộ Viễn thông về mạng điện thoại cho thấy có vấn đề nghiêm trọng về dung lượng.

definition: The science that deals with the study of the atmosphere and its phenomena, especially with weather and weather forecasting.
example: We need to understand the concept of meteorology.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm khí tượng học.

definition: Any or all of the forms of water particles, whether liquid or solid, that fall from the atmosphere (e.g., rain, hail, snow or sleet). It is a major class of hydrometeor, but it is distinguished from cloud, fog, dew, rime, frost, etc., in that it must fall. It is distinguished from cloud and virga in that it must reach the ground.
example: We need to understand the concept of precipitation.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về lượng mưa.

definition: A weather phenomenon in the northwestern Pacific that is precisely equivalent to a hurricane, which results in wind speeds of 64 knots (118 km/h) or above. Equivalent to a cyclone in the Indian Ocean and Indonesia/Australia.
example: We need to understand the concept of typhoon.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bão.

definition: A storm, especially one with severe winds.
example: We need to understand the concept of tempest.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm bão tố.

definition: Pellets of ice made of mostly frozen raindrops or refrozen melted snowflakes.
example: We need to understand the concept of sleet.
exampleVi: Chúng ta cần hiểu khái niệm về mưa đá.

definition: A place from which something can be viewed.
example: Perched on the edge of the cliff was a hidden outlook.
exampleVi: Nằm trên rìa vách đá là một góc nhìn ẩn giấu.

definition: A violent windstorm characterized by a mobile, twisting, funnel-shaped cloud.
example: A tornado is a rotating column of air.
exampleVi: Lốc xoáy là một cột không khí quay tròn.
